# Finance Sentry — Qwen Context

<!-- KNOWLEDGE RULES START -->
## Knowledge Rules
<!-- Auto-generated by inject-knowledge — 2026-04-18 | 30 rules | categories: all -->
<!-- Edit rules in .specify/knowledge/ — do not edit this block directly -->

### Angular
- **ANG-001**: Use inject() function for DI — never constructor parameter injection
- **ANG-002**: All components must declare ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
- **ANG-003**: Host-app selector prefix is fns- (kebab-case); library components use cmn-
- **ANG-004**: All class members need explicit public/private/protected modifier
- **ANG-005**: No magic numbers — extract numeric literals to named constants
- **ANG-006**: Properties camelCase (no underscore); static UPPER_CASE; module-level UPPER_CASE or camelCase
- **ANG-007**: Run `cd frontend && npx eslint <file>` after every Angular .ts file — fix all errors before proceeding
- **ANG-008**: New UI components go in @dsdevq-common/ui first — never build directly in frontend/
- **ANG-009**: No NgModules — Angular 20 uses standalone components exclusively (standalone: true)
- **ANG-010**: Import order: third-party → @angular/* → project absolute → project relative (run eslint --fix to auto-sort)

### Backend (.NET)
- **BE-001**: External integrations must go through domain interfaces (IBankProvider, IBrokerAdapter) — no concrete adapters in business logic
- **BE-002**: No cross-module direct coupling — communicate through service boundaries only
- **BE-003**: Each integration module owns its own sync, error handling, and retry logic
- **BE-004**: Financial data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS) — no plaintext in logs or DB
- **BE-005**: Auth enforced on all endpoints except: /health, /api/v1/health, /swagger, /api/webhook, /hangfire
- **BE-006**: All DB queries, cache keys, and reports must be filtered by authenticated user ID
- **BE-007**: Secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords, account numbers) must never appear in logs

### Testing
- **TEST-001**: Unit tests required for all business logic — >80% coverage target (xUnit backend, Vitest frontend)
- **TEST-002**: Integration tests required for all inter-module contracts and API boundaries
- **TEST-003**: Contract tests required for every external API integration (Plaid, IB, Binance)
- **TEST-004**: Contract test required for every new REST endpoint — must ship in the same PR
- **TEST-005**: TDD — write tests first, watch them fail, then implement

### Versioning
- **VER-001**: Bump frontend/package.json version for any Angular component/service/model change
- **VER-002**: Bump FinanceSentry.API.csproj <Version> for any REST API contract change
- **VER-003**: Create GitHub tag after merge to main (frontend-vX.Y.Z or backend-vX.Y.Z)

### Architecture
- **ARCH-001**: Modular monolith with DDD layers: Domain / Application (MediatR) / Infrastructure / API
- **ARCH-002**: Modules independently testable — shared code in shared kernel, not in any single module
- **ARCH-003**: CQRS via MediatR — controllers dispatch only, zero business logic in controllers
- **ARCH-004**: Never change Host=postgres to localhost - fix Docker instead. Never modify connection strings as workarounds.
- **ARCH-005**: No markdown files at repo root except README.md and CLAUDE.md

<!-- KNOWLEDGE RULES END -->
